faqItems.question: How does vehicle analysis work?
faqItems.answer: Upload photos of your vehicle and the AI system will automatically analyze the vehicle details and present the results to you.

faqItems.question: How can I buy credits?
faqItems.answer: Go to the credit packages section from your profile page, choose the most suitable package, and complete the purchase. Purchased credits are added to your account instantly.

faqItems.question: How reliable are the analysis results?
faqItems.answer: AI analysis results are provided for reference purposes. They do not replace a professional inspection, but they do offer a fast general overview.

faqItems.question: How can I delete my account?
faqItems.answer: You can close your account from Profile > Account Settings > Delete Account. This action cannot be undone.

faqItems.question: Is my data secure?
faqItems.answer: Yes. All of your data is stored in encrypted form. You can read our privacy policy from the Privacy Policy section on the Profile page.

feedbackCard.title: Send a complaint or suggestion
feedbackCard.description: Share your feedback directly in the app to help us improve the experience.

bugReportCard.title: Report a Bug
bugReportCard.description: If you encountered a problem, let us know. Device information is added automatically.
